justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves and computes private Pocketly dashboard data without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves active account records and computes balances from existing transactions without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves active income and expense categories without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or external third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new private category record in Pocketly, so it changes stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only writes to the private Pocketly database and does not publish or send data externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates fields on an existing private category record, so it changes stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only writes to the private Pocketly database and does not publish or send data externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible destructive actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Soft-deletes an existing private category record, so it changes stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only writes to the private Pocketly database and does not publish or send data externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Marks the selected category as deleted, removing it from active use.
